highlight: Development of highly interactive applications and e-commerce oriented towards client-side performance, connecting product design (Figma) with highly tested modular code.
achievements: Design and development of an interactive Dashboard/Page Builder, empowering end-users to self-configure and deploy their own landing pages through dynamic component rendering.
Frontend development of a modular E-commerce, optimizing Core Web Vitals through clean component structuring and reducing Total Blocking Time (TBT).
High-fidelity abstraction and layout implementation from Figma-to-Code, ensuring quality and coverage via unit testing with Jest under SOLID principles.
